canonical_name: Ankyrin Repeat and Sterile Alpha Motif Domains 1A
step_rationale: CAD susceptibility locus; protein–protein interaction/signaling role.
mechanism: A genetic locus associated with CAD susceptibility, with pleiotropic or signaling effects.

references.title: Novel risk genes identified in a genome-wide association study for coronary artery disease in patients with type 1 diabetes.
